name: XMAX V3 Nano Screen Pack
summary: Maintain peak performance with the XMax V3 Nano Screen Pack —a complete maintenance accessory set for the XMax V3 Nano Vaporiser.
description: Maintain peak performance with the XMax V3 Nano Screen Pack —a complete maintenance accessory set for the XMax V3 Nano Vaporiser. Designed for routine upkeep, this pack helps ensure clean airflow, reliable sealing, and consistent vapour quality. This comprehensive set includes essential replacement components such as mouthpiece and chamber screens, along with an O-ring and packing tool. It provides everything needed to keep the device clean, efficient, and ready for regular use. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
